things.name: St John's Co-Cathedral
things.description: Baroque masterpiece housing Caravaggio's largest painting, The Beheading of Saint John

things.name: Upper Barrakka Gardens
things.description: Clifftop garden with cannon salute at noon and panoramic views of the Grand Harbour

things.name: Grand Harbour
things.description: One of the world's finest natural harbours, scene of the Great Siege of 1565

things.name: Mdina - The Silent City
things.description: Medieval walled hilltop city, former capital of Malta with cathedral and noble palaces

things.name: Blue Grotto
things.description: Sea caves near Zurrieq illuminated by vivid blue phosphorescence, accessible by boat

things.name: Three Cities (Vittoriosa, Senglea, Cospicua)
things.description: Historic fortified cities across the Grand Harbour from Valletta

things.name: Hagar Qim & Mnajdra Temples
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage megalithic temples older than Stonehenge and the Pyramids

things.name: Republic Street
things.description: Valletta's main pedestrian street lined with Baroque buildings, cafes and shops

things.name: National Museum of Archaeology
things.description: Neolithic figurines including the famous Sleeping Lady from the Hal Saflieni Hypogeum

things.name: Gozo Island
things.description: Ferry to the sister island with the Azure Window ruins, salt pans and Ggantija temples
